---
title: "Questions"
author: "Zain Hoda"
date: "June 5, 2026"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
---

## Introduction
Listing the questions that can be asked from the dataset which would require the respondents to toggle the settings in the dashboard.

## Questions

Q1 Which dragon type has the highest average flying speed?

Answer: Pick one option from 4 (Forest, Mountain, Sea, All same)

Q2 Across all dragon types combined, how are weight and flying speed related?

Answer: Pick one option (positively related, negatively related, no relation, cannot determine from the data)

Q3 Which dragon type has the largest average wingspan?

Answer: Pick one option from 4 (Forest, Mountain, Sea, All same)

Q4 When filtering to a single dragon type, how does wingspan relate to flying speed?

Answer: Pick one option (positively related, negatively related, no relation, cannot determine from the data)

Q5 When all dragon types are shown together, how does wingspan relate to flying speed?

Answer: Pick one option (positively related, negatively related, no relation, cannot determine from the data)

Q6 At the same claw length, which dragon type tends to have a larger wingspan — Mountain Dragons or Sea Dragons?

Answer: Pick one option (Mountain Dragon, Sea Dragon, Both will have same wingspan, Cannot determine from the data)
